provisions.content:
MALTA FINANCIAL SERVICES AUTHORITY ACT
(EUROPEAN CROWDFUNDING SERVICE PROVIDERS
FOR BUSINESS) (FEES)

[ L.S.330.19

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 330.19
REGOLAMENTI DWAR MALTA FINANCIAL
SERVICES AUTHORITY ACT (EUROPEAN
CROWDFUNDING SERVICE PROVIDERS FOR
BUSINESS) (FEES)*
14 ta’ Settembru, 2022

L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 230 tal-2022.

Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew imħassrin bl-Avviż Legali 197 tal-2025.

1
